title: Developer Adoption Review Briefing
summary: Product signals from docs usage, support tickets, onboarding interviews, and pilot-team notes. Briefing focus: Summarize adoption risks and recommend the next product-quality improvement for pilot expansion.

claims.text: Docs analytics: Quickstart completion rose from 44% to 58% after the copy refresh, and the first API call step now has fewer exits.
Support digest: Most new tickets mention environment drift, stale CLI versions, and unclear recovery steps after failed installs.
Pilot interviews: Senior engineers said they trust generated recommendations only when each claim points back to source snippets they can inspect.

openQuestions: Confirm whether pilot expansion note has newer follow-up data.
Confirm whether onboarding triage notes has newer follow-up data.
recommendation: Use this as a fast first pass, then inspect source tension and citation support in the lab before treating the recommendation as shippable.
